query:
SELECT bve.id, bve.doctor_id, u.username as doctor_name, bve.pricing_status, bve.doctor_price,
       bve.system_price, bve.signed_at
FROM billing_visit_events bve
JOIN users u ON u.id = bve.doctor_id
WHERE bve.unit_id = 180001
  AND bve.pricing_status = 'pending'
ORDER BY bve.signed_at DESC;
